title: ceratostylis keysseri
intro: Ceratostylis keysseri, also known as the Keysser's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. Native to the Philippines, this plant is known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries. The extracts from Ceratostylis keysseri contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is believed to offer various health benefits, including improving cardiovascular health and boosting the immune system.
